title: Historical Achievement Sculpture Grid

imagePrompts.prompt: 2x2 grid, do this for 4 famous human achievements in history: Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  Interlocking oval shapes, meticulously piled and glued to form a 3D organic puzzle, stacked to create rounded topographical mass::4   Material Physics:  Roasted oily surface, deep dark brown hues, central crack visible in each bean, dry but glossy texture::3   Illumination:  Warm cafe lighting, strong specular highlights bouncing off the oily skins, deep black shadows in the cracks::2   Render Stack:  Culinary macro photography, highly tactile, photorealistic, 8k::1 Negative:deep teal:: -1
imagePrompts.title: 2X2 Grid Do This 4 Famous Human

prompt: 2x2 grid, do this for 4 famous human achievements in history: Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  Interlocking oval shapes, meticulously piled and glued to form a 3D organic puzzle, stacked to create rounded topographical mass::4   Material Physics:  Roasted oily surface, deep dark brown hues, central crack visible in each bean, dry but glossy texture::3   Illumination:  Warm cafe lighting, strong specular highlights bouncing off the oily skins, deep black shadows in the cracks::2   Render Stack:  Culinary macro photography, highly tactile, photorealistic, 8k::1 Negative:deep teal:: -1
originalPrompt: 2x2 grid, do this for 4 famous human achievements in history: Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  Interlocking oval shapes, meticulously piled and glued to form a 3D organic puzzle, stacked to create rounded topographical mass::4   Material Physics:  Roasted oily surface, deep dark brown hues, central crack visible in each bean, dry but glossy texture::3   Illumination:  Warm cafe lighting, strong specular highlights bouncing off the oily skins, deep black shadows in the cracks::2   Render Stack:  Culinary macro photography, highly tactile, photorealistic, 8k::1 Negative:deep teal:: -1

promptTranslations.zh: 2x2 网格，为历史上 4 项著名人类成就执行此生成方式：Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  相互嵌合的椭圆形咖啡豆，被细致堆叠并粘合成 3D 有机拼图，层层堆起形成圆润的地形体量::4   Material Physics:  烘焙后的油润表面，深暗棕色调，每颗豆子的中央裂纹清晰可见，干燥但带有光泽的质感::3   Illumination:  温暖咖啡馆灯光，油润豆皮上有强烈镜面高光反射，裂缝中形成深黑阴影::2   Render Stack:  美食微距摄影，高触感，照片级真实，8k::1 Negative:[液态咖啡，手绘，2D，扁平，塑料，金属质感，鲜艳彩色]:: -1
promptTranslations.fr: Grille 2x2, appliquez ceci à 4 grandes réalisations humaines de l’histoire : Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  Formes ovales imbriquées, minutieusement empilées et collées pour former un puzzle organique 3D, superposées en une masse topographique arrondie::4   Material Physics:  Surface torréfiée et huileuse, tons brun très foncé, fissure centrale visible sur chaque grain, texture sèche mais brillante::3   Illumination:  Éclairage chaud de café, forts reflets spéculaires sur les peaux huileuses, ombres noires profondes dans les fissures::2   Render Stack:  Macrophotographie culinaire, très tactile, photoréaliste, 8k::1 Negative:[café liquide, dessin, 2D, plat, plastique, métallique, couleurs vives]:: -1
promptTranslations.ru: Сетка 2x2, примените это к 4 знаменитым достижениям человечества в истории: Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  Переплетенные овальные формы, тщательно сложенные и склеенные в органический 3D-пазл, образующий округлую топографическую массу::4   Material Physics:  Обжаренная маслянистая поверхность, глубокие темно-коричневые оттенки, центральная трещина видна на каждом зерне, сухая, но глянцевая текстура::3   Illumination:  Теплый свет кафе, сильные зеркальные блики на маслянистой кожице, глубокие черные тени в трещинах::2   Render Stack:  Кулинарная макрофотография, высокая тактильность, фотореализм, 8k::1 Negative:[жидкий кофе, рисунок, 2D, плоскость, пластик, металл, яркие цвета]:: -1
promptTranslations.pt: Grade 2x2, aplique isto a 4 grandes conquistas humanas da história: Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  Formas ovais intertravadas, meticulosamente empilhadas e coladas para formar um quebra-cabeça orgânico 3D, empilhadas em uma massa topográfica arredondada::4   Material Physics:  Superfície torrada e oleosa, tons de marrom muito escuro, fissura central visível em cada grão, textura seca mas brilhante::3   Illumination:  Iluminação quente de cafeteria, fortes reflexos especulares na casca oleosa, sombras pretas profundas nas fissuras::2   Render Stack:  Macrofotografia culinária, altamente tátil, fotorrealista, 8k::1 Negative:[café líquido, desenho, 2D, plano, plástico, metálico, cores vivas]:: -1
promptTranslations.ja: 2x2グリッドで、歴史上の有名な人類の偉業4つにこの表現を適用する：Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  かみ合う楕円形を、3Dの有機的なパズルになるよう丁寧に積み重ねて接着し、丸みのある地形のような量感を作る::4   Material Physics:  焙煎された油分のある表面、深いダークブラウン、各豆の中央の割れ目が見える、乾いているが艶のある質感::3   Illumination:  暖かいカフェ照明、油分のある表皮に強いスペキュラーハイライト、割れ目には深い黒い影::2   Render Stack:  フード系マクロ写真、高い触感、フォトリアル、8k::1 Negative:[液体のコーヒー、手描き、2D、平面、プラスチック、金属質、鮮やかな色]:: -1
promptTranslations.ko: 2x2 그리드로, 역사상 유명한 인류의 업적 4가지를 이 방식으로 표현합니다: Input = Subject Function Render_Coffee_Bean_Sculpture ($ Subject) Anchor:ceramic fox mascot :: Roasted Bean Assembly::5   Morphology:  서로 맞물린 타원형을 세심하게 쌓고 접착해 3D 유기적 퍼즐을 만들고, 둥근 지형 같은 덩어리로 쌓아 올림::4   Material Physics:  볶은 원두의 기름진 표면, 깊고 어두운 갈색 톤, 각 원두 중앙의 갈라진 틈이 보이며 건조하지만 광택 있는 질감::3   Illumination:  따뜻한 카페 조명, 기름진 표면에 강하게 반사되는 스페큘러 하이라이트, 갈라진 틈 속의 깊은 검은 그림자::2   Render Stack:  음식 매크로 사진, 촉감이 강한 표현, 포토리얼, 8k::1 Negative:[액체 커피, 손그림, 2D, 평면, 플라스틱, 금속성, 밝은 색상]:: -1
